daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are keeping you sharp and curious. There's this magnetic pull toward conversations that actually matter—lean into it. Your energy is giving thoughtful but playful, and people are noticing.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, today's a good day to get vulnerable about something small. Single? That person keeps crossing your mind for a reason. Trust your gut on whether to make a move.
daily.career: You're seeing the bigger picture now, and it's changing how you approach your work. That project or conversation you've been hesitating on? Today's the day to go for it with confidence.
daily.health: Your nervous system's been working overtime. Today, do something that feels grounding—whether that's time outside, stretching, or just unplugging for an hour. Your body's asking for it.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to lean into your natural gift for seeing multiple sides of things. You're not indecisive—you're just vibing with complexity. Trust the clarity that comes when you stop forcing answers.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing you quietly. Whether you're coupled or single, this week brings honest conversations that actually feel good. Let yourself be a little vulnerable; it's your superpower right now.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Don't shy away from sharing that creative take or unconventional solution. People are genuinely listening, and your perspective could shift something important.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for balance—think less intense workouts and more what actually feels restorative. Maybe it's yoga, long walks, or just sleeping more. Listen to that whisper before it becomes a shout.
